releases.title: Improved Error Tracking
releases.blurb: The Error Rate card now shows real-time trends and alerts when the rate exceeds your configured threshold. Click the card for a detailed breakdown.

releases.title: New Reports Dashboard
releases.blurb: A brand new Reports screen with trend charts and filterable data views. Access it from the sidebar navigation.

releases.title: Activity Log Enhancements
releases.blurb: The Recent Activity table now includes status indicators and sortable columns for quicker triage.
